arts.ttl: Newcastle and Tottenham to battle European giants for €35m-rated talent wanted by nine other clubs
arts.sum: Decent centre-backs don’t come up for sale very often, so it’s no surprise to see up to 11 clubs wanted to do battle for PSG’s brilliant Slovak defender, Milan Skriniar. According to CaughtOffside sources with knowledge of Paris Saint-Germain‘s transfer plans, Milan Skriniar is set to be made available in the January transfer window for […] The post Newcastle and Tottenham to battle European giants for €35m-rated talent wanted by nine other clubs appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Former Tottenham & Everton Star Set to Join Como on Trial Basis
arts.sum: Former Tottenham Hotspur star Dele Alli is on the verge of joining Como on a trial basis after terminating his contract at Everton last summer. According to Gazzetta dello Sport, the 28-year-old midfielder will train with Cesc Fabregas' side for the first time today. The post Former Tottenham & Everton Star Set to Join Como on Trial Basis appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Tottenham prepared to blow London rivals out of the water for exciting Juve talent
arts.sum: Juventus’ young Italian footballer Nicolo Fagioli continues to attract the interest of many Premier League clubs. The Bianconeri have already stated that they are ready to sell the midfielder for €25m, and although CaughtOffside sources understand that some Premier League clubs are ready to pay this fee, no official offer for Nicolo Fagioli has been […] The post Tottenham prepared to blow London rivals out of the water for exciting Juve talent appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: What channel is Nottingham Forest vs Spurs on? How to watch Premier League match for free
arts.sum: Christmas has been and gone and that means a stacked day of Premier League actions awaits on Boxing Day, including Nottingham Forest welcoming Tottenham Hotspur

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou admits big Tottenham wishlist amid Ben Godfrey January transfer update
arts.sum: Asked how realistic it is that there are players available in January to improve the team and also improve the depth of the squad, the Australian revealed that the new format for UEFA's club competitions could possibly complicate matters this time around. Just like Postecoglou, Espirito Santo also came in for criticism during his time in N17 but the current Spurs boss believes that it all stems from people looking for perfection.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Tottenham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest vs Tottenham Premier League preview, including team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: What Ange Postecoglou will ask Daniel Levy for in the January transfer window at Tottenham
arts.sum: As always Tottenham must continue to keep within their squad limits and the rules for homegrown and foreign players, with the Europa League lacking in spaces for new recruits unless others drop out, but Postecoglou will need to continue his squad revamp in this coming January window with at least one or two arrivals to prevent another period of struggle and overused players. When football.london put it to Postecoglou toward the end of the last summer window that he had swapped Eric Dier for Radu Dragusin and last season admitted he wanted another centre-back, so surely needed another natural man in the middle of the back four, the Australian played down the idea.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou insists he is 'responsible' for Tottenham's struggles this season ahead of Boxing Day meeting with high-flying Nottingham Forest and former manager Nuno Espirito Santo
arts.sum: There were very few voices of dissent when Nuno Espirito Santo's short reign as Tottenham boss came to an end.

arts.ttl: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou takes a swipe at his critics as he insists it's impossible to get everything right
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Ange Postecoglou has taken a swipe at his critics, dismissing them as perfectionists on an impossible quest for flawless football.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot names one star who can make a key difference as he rekindles rivalry with Ruud van Nistelrooy - and warns Liverpool stars to learn from frenzied Tottenham match ahead of Leicester clash
arts.sum: AADAM PATEL: Arne Slot has warned his Liverpool players they must be on top of their game against Leicester on Thursday night.
